title: Zoho Campaigns vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Zoho Campaigns vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Zoho Campaigns vs Privy: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Zoho Campaigns and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Zoho Campaigns is built for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.q: Is Zoho Campaigns better than Privy?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Zoho Campaigns wins for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Zoho Campaigns or Privy?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
